case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

tool_calls.name: get_evidence
tool_calls.reasoning: Start with a broad scan of metrics to identify suspicious components or windows

reasoner.analysis: Checked 0-60s productcatalogservice metrics. Latency.p50 dev=+2.1 and trace call counts confirm latency as root cause. Rankings updated to productcatalogservice_latency first.
Productcatalogservice latency confirmed as root cause. Checkoutservice mem and adservice latency show secondary anomalies.
